title: elymus enysii
intro: Elymus enysii, also known as Enys' wheat-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the genus Elymus. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus enysii include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Elymus enysii can be prepared into various herbal products such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a versatile and accessible addition to a healthy lifestyle.
